info.title: Snowflake Orders API
info.description: Read-only orders + customers service backed by Snowflake, used as an AgentCore Gateway target.

servers.description: Lambda Function URL (set by infra/provision Snowflake Lambda)

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Service path — the agent's own identity. The Gateway injects this for non-OBO calls; the stub then signs a Snowflake KEYPAIR_JWT as the SELECT-only AGENT_RO role.

BearerAuth.description: User (OBO) path — a per-user Entra token the Gateway injects via TOKEN_EXCHANGE; the stub forwards it to Snowflake (token-type OAUTH) so Snowflake enforces THAT user's RBAC.

get.summary: List orders from Snowflake with optional filters
get.description: Returns orders joined to their customer (name, tier, region, credit limit). Use this to find orders by status (e.g. OPEN), sales channel, customer tier, or a minimum amount. All filters are optional and combine with AND; omit them to list all orders.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by order status, e.g. OPEN, SHIPPED, CANCELLED (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter by sales channel, e.g. WEB, PHONE, PARTNER (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: tier
parameters.description: Filter by customer tier, e.g. smb, enterprise (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: min_amount
parameters.description: Only return orders whose amount is greater than or equal to this value.

401.description: Missing or invalid credential (X-API-Key or Bearer token)

get.summary: Get a single order by id from Snowflake
get.description: Returns one order (joined to its customer) by order id, e.g. O-1003. Use this when you already know the exact order id and need its full detail. Returns 404 if no such order exists.

401.description: Missing or invalid credential (X-API-Key or Bearer token)

get.description: Returns all customer records (name, tier, region, credit limit). Customer master data is non-confidential, so this is read on the agent's own identity and is available regardless of the signed-in user. Use this to look up a customer by name or to browse customers.

401.description: Missing or invalid credential (X-API-Key or Bearer token)

get.summary: Get a single customer by id from Snowflake
get.description: Returns one customer record (name, tier, region, credit limit) by customer id, e.g. C-002. Use this to look up customer details such as tier or credit limit. Returns 404 if no such customer exists.

401.description: Missing or invalid credential (X-API-Key or Bearer token)
